languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the lumens of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн вежливо улыбается.{/n} "Если в моем распоряжении будет подходящий источник Движущей Силы для перераспределения, я смогу оживить {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмены{/g} на всей палубе, Вольный Торговец. Однако я надеюсь, что это не единственное применение, которые вы найдете моим талантам".

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн вежливо улыбается{/n} "Если в моем распоряжении будет подходящий источник Движущей Силы для перераспределения, я смогу оживить {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмены{/g} на всей палубе, Вольный Торговец. Однако я надеюсь, что это не единственное применение, которые вы найдете моим талантам".

Однако я надеюсь, что это не единственное применение, которые вы найдете моим талантам".

{n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

{n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sonríe educadamente.{/n} «Con una fuente apropiada de Fuerza Motriz que redistribuir, podría encender los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} de toda una cubierta, Comerciante. Sin embargo, confío en que ese no será el único uso que encuentre a mis talentos».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sonríe educadamente.{/n} «Con una fuente apropiada de Fuerza Motriz que redistribuir, podría encender los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} de toda una cubierta, Comerciante. Sin embargo, confío en que ese no será el único uso que encuentre a mis talentos».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡礼貌地笑了笑。{/n}“只要有合适的源力让我重新分配，我就能点亮整层甲板的{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}，行商浪人。不过，我不希望您只把我的能力用在这种事上。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡礼貌地笑了笑。{/n}“只要有合适的源力让我重新分配，我就能点亮整层甲板的{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}，行商浪人。不过，我不希望您只把我的能力用在这种事上。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sourit poliment.{/n} « Avec suffisamment de Force Motrice, je pourrais activer les {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} d'un pont tout entier, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Néanmoins, j'ose espérer que vous trouverez mieux à faire de mes talents. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sourit poliment.{/n} « Avec suffisamment de Force Motrice, je pourrais activer les {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} d'un pont tout entier, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Néanmoins, j'ose espérer que vous trouverez mieux à faire de mes talents. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lächelt höflich.{/n} "Mit einer geeigneten Quelle der Antriebskraft könnte ich die {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} eines ganzen Decks reaktivieren, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Allerdings hoffe ich, das ist nicht das einzige Einsatzgebiet, das Ihr für meine Talente finden werdet."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lächelt höflich.{/n} "Mit einer geeigneten Quelle der Antriebskraft könnte ich die {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} eines ganzen Decks reaktivieren, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Allerdings hoffe ich, das ist nicht das einzige Einsatzgebiet, das Ihr für meine Talente finden werdet."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは丁寧に微笑む。{/n}「適切な原動力の再分配源があれば、デッキ全体を明るく照らすことができるんだ、ローグ・トレーダー。しかし、私の才能を生かす用途がそれだけでないことを願うよ」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは丁寧に微笑む。{/n}「適切な原動力の再分配源があれば、デッキ全体を明るく照らすことができるんだ、ローグ・トレーダー。しかし、私の才能を生かす用途がそれだけでないことを願うよ」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nazikçe gülümsüyor.{/n} "Yeniden dağıtmaya uygun bir Devinim Gücü kaynağıyla, koca bir güvertedeki tüm {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lümenleri{/g} aydınlatabilirim Hür Tacir. Ancak yeteneklerime uygun başka işler bulacağınızı umuyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles politely.{/n} "With a suitable source of Motive Force to redistribute, I could light up the {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} of an entire deck, Rogue Trader. However, I do hope that is not the only application you will find for my talents."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nazikçe gülümsüyor.{/n} "Yeniden dağıtmaya uygun bir Devinim Gücü kaynağıyla, koca bir güvertedeki tüm {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lümenleri{/g} aydınlatabilirim Hür Tacir. Ancak yeteneklerime uygun başka işler bulacağınızı umuyorum."
